prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市最低录取位次分别为约3794名、4276名、3914名、4841名、4285名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年位次区间在3794–4841之间波动；2025年基准位次约4285名，较2024年最高点4841名有所回升；该校在上海市招生计划2021–2024年稳定在22–23人，2025年缩减至15人，2026年进一步缩减至12人，较2025年缩招20%，为近6年最低计划数，缩招对竞争压力有双向影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第11名（近年从第15名持续上升至第11名），属于全国顶尖工科院校，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第56（较热），整体曝光度中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见北航断档信号；拥有航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程等7个A+学科，以及信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程等A级学科，A-及以上共16个，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、电子信息/通信等专业持续高热推荐，北航2026年招生专业以工科试验班（未来空天领军计划、计算与智能科学类、信息科学与技术类、航空航天类）和人工智能为主，均为当前社会高热专业方向；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；北航位于北京，上海考生对京校认可度较高；该校在全国招生总量中上海占比极小（约0.2%–0.3%），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4285名、2026年招生计划缩招20%、上海考生总数大幅增长约35.4%导致竞争加剧、声誉负面事件可能小幅抑制报考热度、以及计算机/AI等专业持续高热吸引高分考生等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较，预测最低位次约3971名，区间3518–4424名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班类（未来空天领军计划）
- 人工智能（卓越人才培养试验班）
- 工科试验班类（计算与智能科学类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班类（航空航天类）
- 工科试验班类（信息科学与技术类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（含法学、行政管理、经济学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3971名，区间3518–4424名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档工科试验班（航空航天类/信息科学与技术类）为主力填报，一档未来空天领军计划、人工智能、计算与智能科学类作为冲刺，三档社会科学试验班作为保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<3518名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>4424名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings in Shanghai were approximately 3794, 4276, 3914, 4841, and 4285, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with the ranking range fluctuating between 3794 and 4841 in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4285, rebounding from the 2024 peak of 4841; the university's enrollment plan in Shanghai was stable at 22–23 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 15 in 2025, and further reduced to 12 in 2026, a 20% reduction compared to 2025, the lowest plan in the past 6 years, with the reduction having a bidirectional impact on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 11th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (continuously rising from 15th to 11th in recent years), belonging to the top national engineering universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly due to the Yang Yun incident of moral misconduct and academic fraud, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 56 (relatively hot), with overall exposure above average; no signs of admission gaps in historical abnormal admission records; it has 7 A+ disciplines including Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, as well as A-level disciplines such as Information and Communication Engineering and Control Science and Engineering, with a total of 16 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength highly matched with the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended; Beihang's 2026 enrollment majors are mainly Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Aerospace Leading Plan, Computing and Intelligent Science, Information Science and Technology, Aerospace) and Artificial Intelligence, all of which are currently popular high-demand majors; the total number of Shanghai Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Beihang is located in Beijing, and Shanghai candidates have a high recognition of Beijing universities; the university's Shanghai share of total national enrollment is very small (about 0.2%–0.3%), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment with no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 4285, the 20% reduction in 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates leading to intensified competition, the negative reputation event possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the continued high popularity of majors like Computer Science/AI attracting high-scoring candidates, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 3971, with a range of 3518–4424.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Plan)
- Artificial Intelligence (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Public Administration, Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 3971, range 3518–4424. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to primarily fill in Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Aerospace/Information Science and Technology), with Tier 1 Future Aerospace Leading Plan, Artificial Intelligence, and Computing and Intelligent Science as reach options, and Tier 3 Social Science Experimental Class as safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<3518) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (>4424) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.
